0.text: Diffuse centriacinar nodular infiltrates of ground glass density in the left lung

1.text: Tree-in-bud opacities in the left lung

2.text: Consolidation in the anterior segment of the upper lobe of the left lung

3.text: Consolidation in the paracardiac area of the left lung

4.text: Bilateral subpleural nodules, each measuring less than 5 mm
